unlock_hints: future sessions now have a first-class checkpoint phase and CLI path instead of relying only on post-session harvest
reviewed checkpoint notes can now promote into Dionysus without forcing the heavy session-harvest family too early
closeout handoff can now carry surviving checkpoint clusters instead of losing mid-session growth context
cautions: checkpoint capture still depends on explicit command use and has not yet been hardened through repeated non-implementation sessions
the route remains not-automation-ready until real reviewed repetitions prove the checkpoint loop outside the implementation session itself
checkpoint notes stay lower-authority than harvest verdicts and must not be treated as substitute receipts
